よし、小僧。今日はお主に宝石の見分け方を教えてやろう。<br>覚えておいて損はな:
Right then, boy. Today I'll teach you how to tell gemstones apart.
You'll thank me later.
どうして……じゃとぉ？ はぁ……まったく……小僧よ……<br>だからお主はいつま:
Why... you ask? *sigh*... Honestly, boy...
That's why you'll always be a boy.
よいか？ 宝石は、女性が好むもの。つまり、男も宝石のことを<br>熟知しておかな:
Listen well. Women love gemstones. So you, a man, need to know them
well too. Do you know why?
プレゼントした時に、それが偽物であれば恥をかくであろう？ それに女性は<br>ど:
If you gave a fake gemstone, you'd be embarrassed, wouldn't you?
Women size up a man by the gems he gives. Plus... blah blah blah blah—
――というわけじゃ。では、早速宝石を見に……あれ？ 閉店してる、じゃと？<br>:
That's the gist. Now let's see those gemstones... Huh? The shop's
closed? Drat! Curse this old geezer's habit! How long did I ramble on?
